allow_api_token_file.description: Set this to true if you understand the security risks of using API token files and would like to suppress the warnings

allow_service_account_token_file.description: Set this to true if you understand the security risks of using Service Account token files and would like to suppress the warnings

allow_unverified_ssl.description: If set, VCFAClient will permit unverifiable SSL certificates.

api_token.description: The API token used instead of username/password for VCFA API operations

api_token_file.description: The API token file instead of username/password for VCFA API operations

import_separator.description: Defines the import separation string to be used with 'terraform import'

logging.description: If set, it will enable logging of API requests and responses

logging_file.description: Defines the full name of the logging file for API calls (requires 'logging')

org.description: The VCFA Org for API operations

password.description: The user password for VCFA API operations.

service_account_token_file.description: The Service Account API token file instead of username/password for VCFA API operations. (Requires VCFA 9.0+)

sysorg.description: The VCFA Org for user authentication

token.description: The token used instead of username/password for VCFA API operations.

url.description: The VCFA url for VCFA API operations.

user.description: The user name for VCFA API operations.

allow_token_file.description: Set this to true if you understand the security risks of using API Token files and agree to creating them

file_name.description: Name of the file that the API Token will be saved to

org_id.description: The ID of Organization to use

all_projects_permission.description: Permissions to apply to all projects in the Organization for this Content Library. Can be 'READ_ONLY' or 'READ_WRITE'. Only applicable when 'is_project_scoped' is set to 'true'

auto_attach.description: For Tenant Content Libraries this field represents whether this Content Library should be automatically attached to all current and future namespaces in the Organization. If no value is supplied during creation then this field will default to true. If a value of false is supplied, then this Tenant Content Library will only be attached to namespaces that explicitly request it. For Provider Content Libraries this field is not needed for creation and will always be returned as true. This field cannot be updated after creation

creation_date.description: The ISO-8601 timestamp representing when this Content Library was created

delete_force.description: On deletion, forcefully deletes the Content Library and its Content Library Items. Only for PROVIDER Content Libraries

delete_recursive.description: On deletion, deletes the Content Library, including its Content Library Items, in a single operation

description.description: The description of the Content Library

is_project_scoped.description: Whether this Content Library is scoped to specific projects in the Organization

is_shared.description: Whether this Content Library is shared with other Organizations

is_subscribed.description: Whether this Content Library is subscribed from an external published library

library_type.description: The type of Content Library, can be either PROVIDER (Content Library that is scoped to a provider) or TENANT (Content Library that is scoped to a tenant organization)

name.description: The name of the Content Library

org_id.description: The reference to the Organization that the Content Library belongs to

status.description: Status of this Content Library. Can be 'READY', 'NOT_READY', 'FAILED' or 'PARTIALLY_READY'

storage_class_ids.description: A set of Storage Class IDs used by this Content Library

version_number.description: Version number of this Content Library

permissions.description: The type of project permission ('READ_ONLY' or 'READ_WRITE')

project_id.description: The ID of the project that this permission applies to

project_name.description: The name of the project that this permission applies to

block.description: A set of project permissions for this Content Library. Only applicable when 'is_project_scoped' is set to 'true'

password.description: Password to use to authenticate with the publisher

subscription_url.description: Subscription url of this Content Library

block.description: A block representing subscription settings of a Content Library

content_library_id.description: ID of the Content Library that this Content Library Item belongs to

creation_date.description: The ISO-8601 timestamp representing when this Content Library Item was created

description.description: The description of the Content Library Item

file_paths.description: A single path to an OVA/ISO, or multiple paths for an OVF and its referenced files, to create the Content Library Item

image_identifier.description: Virtual Machine Identifier (VMI) of the Content Library Item. This is a read-only field

is_published.description: Whether this Content Library Item is published

is_subscribed.description: Whether this Content Library Item is subscribed

item_type.description: The type of Content Library Item

last_successful_sync.description: The ISO-8601 timestamp representing when this Content Library Item was last synced if subscribed

name.description: Name of the Content Library Item

owner_org_id.description: The reference to the Organization that the Content Library Item belongs to

status.description: Status of this Content Library Item

version.description: The version of this Content Library Item. For a subscribed library, this version is same as in publisher library

subnet_exclusive.description: Whether this IP Block is exclusively for a single CIDR

active.description: Indicates whether the NSX Manager can or cannot be used to manage networking constructs within VCFA

auto_trust_certificate.description: Defines if the NSX Manager certificate should automatically be trusted

cluster_id.description: Cluster ID of the NSX Manager. Each NSX installation has a single cluster. This is not a VCFA URN

is_dedicated_for_classic_tenants.description: Whether this NSX Manager is dedicated for legacy VRA-style tenants only and unable to participate in modern constructs such as Regions and Zones. Legacy VRA-style is deprecated and this field exists for the purpose of VRA backwards compatibility only

password.description: Password for authenticating to NSX Manager

username.description: Username for authenticating to NSX Manager

can_publish.description: Defines whether the Organization can publish catalogs externally

catalog_count.description: Number of catalog belonging to the Organization

disk_count.description: Number of disks in the Organization

display_name.description: Appears in the Cloud application as a human-readable name of the Organization

is_classic_tenant.description: Defines whether the Organization is a classic VRA-style tenant

is_enabled.description: Defines if the Organization enabled. Defaults to 'true'

name.description: The unique identifier in the full URL with which users log in to this Organization

org_region_quota_count.description: Number of Org Region Quotas belonging to the Organization

running_vm_count.description: Number of running VMs in the Organization

user_count.description: Number of users in the Organization

vapp_count.description: Number of vApps belonging to the Organization

auto_trust_certificate.description: Defines if the LDAP certificate should automatically be trusted, only makes sense if 'custom_settings.0.is_ssl=true'

custom_user_ou.description: If ldap_mode is SYSTEM, specifies a LDAP attribute=value pair to use for OU (organizational unit)

ldap_mode.description: Type of LDAP settings (one of NONE, SYSTEM, CUSTOM)

org_id.description: Organization ID

connector_type.description: type of connector: one of OPEN_LDAP, ACTIVE_DIRECTORY

custom_ui_button_label.description: If you provide a custom button label, on the login screen, the custom label replaces the default label for this identity provider

is_ssl.description: True if the LDAP service requires an SSL connection

password.description: Password for the user identified by UserName. This value is never returned by GET. It is inspected on create and modify. On modify, the absence of this element indicates that the password should not be changed

server.description: host name or IP of the LDAP server

username.description: Username to use when logging in to LDAP, specified using LDAP attribute=value pairs (for example: cn="ldap-admin", c="example", dc="com")

group_back_link_identifier.description: LDAP group attribute used to identify a group member

group_membership_identifier.description: LDAP attribute that identifies a group as a member of another group. For example, the 'dn' attribute

membership.description: LDAP attribute to use when getting the members of a group. For example, the 'member' attribute

name.description: LDAP attribute to use for the group name. For example, the 'cn' attribute

object_class.description: LDAP objectClass of which imported groups are members. For example, the 'group' attribute

unique_identifier.description: LDAP attribute to use as the unique identifier for a group. For example, the 'objectGuid' attribute

block.description: Group settings when `ldap_mode` is CUSTOM

display_name.description: LDAP attribute to use for the user's full name. For example, the 'displayName' attribute

email.description: LDAP attribute to use for the user's email address. For example, the 'mail' attribute

given_name.description: LDAP attribute to use for the user's given name. For example, the 'givenName' attribute

group_back_link_identifier.description: LDAP attribute that returns the identifiers of all the groups of which the user is a member

group_membership_identifier.description: LDAP attribute that identifies a user as a member of a group. For example, the 'dn' attribute

object_class.description: LDAP objectClass of which imported users are members. For example, 'user' or 'person' attributes

surname.description: LDAP attribute to use for the user's surname. For example, the 'sn' attribute

telephone.description: LDAP attribute to use for the user's telephone number. For example, the 'telephoneNumber' attribute

unique_identifier.description: LDAP attribute to use as the unique identifier for a user. For example, the 'objectGuid' attribute

username.description: LDAP attribute to use when looking up a user name to import. For example, 'userPrincipalName' or 'samAccountName' attributes

block.description: LDAP user attributes

org_id.description: Parent Organization ID for Org Local User

role_ids.description: Roles to use for Org Local User

log_name.description: A globally unique identifier (max 8 char) for this Organization in the logs of the backing network provider

networking_tenancy_enabled.description: Whether this Organization has tenancy for the network domain in the backing network provider

org_id.description: Parent Organization for Organization Networking Settings

access_token_endpoint.description: The access token endpoint of the OpenID Connect Identity Provider. If 'wellknown_endpoint' is set, this attribute overrides the obtained access token endpoint

client_id.description: Client ID to use when talking to the OpenID Connect Identity Provider

client_secret.description: Client Secret to use when talking to the OpenID Connect Identity Provider

enabled.description: Enables or disables OpenID Connect authentication for the specified Organization

issuer_id.description: The issuer identifier of the OpenID Connect Identity Provider. If 'wellknown_endpoint' is set, this attribute overrides the obtained issuer identifier

key_expire_duration_hours.description: Defines the expiration period of the key, only when 'key_refresh_strategy=EXPIRE_AFTER'. Maximum is 24 hours

key_refresh_endpoint.description: Endpoint used to refresh the keys. If 'wellknown_endpoint' is set, then this argumentwill override the obtained endpoint

key_refresh_period_hours.description: Defines the frequency of key refresh. Maximum is 720 hours

key_refresh_strategy.description: Defines the strategy of key refresh

max_clock_skew_seconds.description: The maximum clock skew is the maximum allowable time difference between the client and server. This time compensates for any small-time differences in the timestamps when verifying tokens

org_id.description: ID of the Organization that will have the OpenID Connect settings configured

prefer_id_token.description: If you want to combine claims from 'userinfo_endpoint' and the ID Token, set this to 'true'. The identity providers do not provide all the required claims set in 'userinfo_endpoint'.By setting this argument to 'true', VCFA can fetch and consume claims from both sources

scopes.description: A set of scopes to use with the OpenID Connect provider. They are used to authorize access to user details, by defining the permissions that the access tokens have to access user information. If 'wellknown_endpoint' is set, this attribute overrides the obtained scopes

ui_button_label.description: Customizes the label of the UI button of the login screen

user_authorization_endpoint.description: The user authorization endpoint of the OpenID Connect Identity Provider. If 'wellknown_endpoint' is set, this attribute overrides the obtained user authorization endpoint

userinfo_endpoint.description: The user info endpoint of the OpenID Connect Identity Provider. If 'wellknown_endpoint' is set, this attribute overrides the obtained user info endpoint

wellknown_endpoint.description: Endpoint from the OpenID Connect Identity Provider that serves all the configuration values

block.description: A single configuration block that specifies the claim mappings to use with the OpenID Connect provider. If 'wellknown_endpoint' is set, this attribute overrides the obtained claim mappings

algorithm.description: Algorithm of the key, either RSA or EC

block.description: One or more configuration blocks that specify the keys to use with the OpenID Connect Identity Provider. If 'wellknown_endpoint' is set, this attribute overrides the obtained keys

supervisor_namespace_name.description: The name of the Supervisor Namespace to retrieve the kubeconfig for

token.description: Bearer token for authentication to the Kubernetes cluster

active.description: Indicates whether the NSX Manager can or cannot be used to manage networking constructs within VCFA

cluster_id.description: Cluster ID of the NSX Manager. Each NSX installation has a single cluster. This is not a VCFA URN

is_dedicated_for_classic_tenants.description: Whether this NSX Manager is dedicated for legacy VRA-style tenants only and unable to participate in modern constructs such as Regions and Zones. Legacy VRA-style is deprecated and this field exists for the purpose of VRA backwards compatibility only

username.description: Username for authenticating to NSX Manager

can_publish.description: Defines whether the Organization can publish catalogs externally

catalog_count.description: Number of catalog belonging to the Organization

disk_count.description: Number of disks in the Organization

display_name.description: Appears in the Cloud application as a human-readable name of the Organization

is_classic_tenant.description: Defines whether the Organization is a classic VRA-style tenant

name.description: The unique identifier in the full URL with which users log in to this Organization

org_region_quota_count.description: Number of Org Region Quotas belonging to the Organization

running_vm_count.description: Number of running VMs in the Organization

user_count.description: Number of users in the Organization

vapp_count.description: Number of vApps belonging to the Organization

custom_user_ou.description: If ldap_mode is SYSTEM, specifies a LDAP attribute=value pair to use for OU (organizational unit)

ldap_mode.description: Type of LDAP settings (one of NONE, SYSTEM, CUSTOM)

org_id.description: Organization ID
Parent Organization ID for Org Local User

role_ids.description: Roles to use for Org Local User

log_name.description: A globally unique identifier (max 8 char) for this Organization in the logs of the backing network provider

networking_tenancy_enabled.description: Whether this Organization has tenancy for the network domain in the backing network provider

org_id.description: Parent Organization for Organization Networking Settings

access_token_endpoint.description: The access token endpoint of the OpenID Connect Identity Provider

claims_mapping.description: A single configuration block that contains the claim mappings used with the OpenID Connect provider

client_id.description: Client ID used when talking to the OpenID Connect Identity Provider

client_secret.description: Client Secret used when talking to the OpenID Connect Identity Provider

enabled.description: Whether Organization authentication for the specified OpenID Connect is enabled or disabled

issuer_id.description: The issuer identifier of the OpenID Connect Identity Provider

key.description: One or more configuration blocks that contain the keys used with the OpenID Connect Identity Provider

key_expire_duration_hours.description: The expiration period of the key, only available if 'key_refresh_strategy=EXPIRE_AFTER'

key_refresh_endpoint.description: Endpoint used to refresh the keys

key_refresh_strategy.description: Defines the strategy of key refresh

max_clock_skew_seconds.description: The maximum clock skew is the maximum allowable time difference between the client and server

org_id.description: Organization ID that has the OpenID Connect settings

prefer_id_token.description: Whether the claims from 'userinfo_endpoint' and the ID Token are combined (true) or not (false)

scopes.description: A set of scopes used with the OpenID Connect provider

ui_button_label.description: The label of the UI button of the login screen

user_authorization_endpoint.description: The user authorization endpoint of the OpenID Connect Identity Provider

userinfo_endpoint.description: The user info endpoint of the OpenID Connect Identity Provider

wellknown_endpoint.description: Endpoint from the OpenID Connect Identity Provider that serves all the configuration values

description.description: Description of the Org Region Quota

name.description: Name of the Org Region Quota

org_id.description: Parent Organization ID

region_id.description: Parent Region ID

region_storage_policy.description: A set of Region Storage Policy assigned to this Org Region Quota

region_vm_class_ids.description: A set of Region VM Class IDs assigned to this Org Region Quota

supervisor_ids.description: A set of Supervisor IDs that back this Org Region Quota

zone_resource_allocations.description: A set of Region Zones and their resource allocations

edge_cluster_id.description: Backing Edge Cluster ID for Org Regional Networking. Will be autoselected if not specified.

provider_gateway_id.description: Parent Provider Gateway ID for Org Regional Networking

egress_burst_size_bytes.description: Ingress burst size bytes for Regional Networking VPC Connectivity Profile QoS

ingress_burst_size_bytes.description: Ingress burst size bytes for Regional Networking VPC Connectivity Profile QoS

ingress_committed_bandwidth_mbps.description: Ingress committed bandwidth in Mbps for Regional Networking VPC Connectivity Profile QoS

can_create_subscribed_libraries.description: Whether the Organization can create content libraries that are subscribed to external sources

can_subscribe_to_third_party_libraries.description: Whether the Organization can create content libraries that are subscribed to official third-party sources

org_id.description: Parent Organization for Organization Settings

quarantine_content_library_items.description: Whether to quarantine new Content Library Items for file inspection

allow_advertising_private_ip_blocks.description: Allows the Provider Gateway to advertise their own private IP Blocks

gateway_connection_backing_id.description: The ID of the associated Gateway Connection in NSX, if any

inbound_remote_networks.description: The total span of IP addresses to which the Provider Gateway has access

ip_space_ids.description: A set of IP Space IDs used in this Provider Gateway

nat_config_enabled.description: Whether the Outbound NAT is enabled for the Provider Gateway

nat_config_ip_space_id.description: IP Space used to configure Outbound NAT

nat_config_logging.description: Whether logging is enabled for the Outbound NAT configuration

tier0_gateway_id.description: Parent Tier-0 Gateway of Provider Gateway

connector_type.description: Type of connector: one of OPEN_LDAP, ACTIVE_DIRECTORY

custom_ui_button_label.description: If you provide a custom button label, on the login screen, the custom label replaces the default label for this identity provider

is_ssl.description: True if the LDAP service requires an SSL connection

server.description: host name or IP of the LDAP server

username.description: Username to use when logging in to LDAP, specified using LDAP attribute=value pairs (for example: cn="ldap-admin", c="example", dc="com")

supervisor_ids.description: A set of supervisor IDs used in this Region

status.description: The creation status of the Region Storage Policy. Can be [NOT_READY, READY]

storage_capacity_mb.description: Storage capacity in megabytes for this Region Storage Policy

storage_consumed_mb.description: Consumed storage in megabytes for this Region Storage Policy

cpu_count.description: Number of CPUs that a Virtual Machine gets when this Region VM Class is applied

cpu_reservation_mhz.description: CPU that a Virtual Machine reserves when this Region VM Class is applied

memory_mib.description: Memory in MiB that a Virtual Machine gets when this Region VM Class is applied

memory_reservation_mib.description: Memory in MiB that a Virtual Machine reserves when this Region VM Class is applied

name.description: The name of the Region VM Class

region_id.description: The ID of the Region that owns the Region VM Class

reserved.description: Whether this Region VM Class can be used to reserve number of its instances within a namespace

region_id.description: Parent Region ID for Region Zone

category_id.description: ID of the category for this Right

implied_rights.description: List of Rights that are implied with this one

org_ids.description: Set of Organizations to which this Rights Bundle is published

publish_to_all_orgs.description: When true, publishes the Rights Bundle to all Organizations

read_only.description: Whether this Rights Bundle is read-only

rights.description: Set of Rights assigned to this Rights Bundle

org_id.description: The ID of the Organization of the Role

rights.description: Set of Rights assigned to this Role

backing_id.description: ID for the matching Subnet in NSX

gateway_cidr.description: The gateway CIDR for the Shared Subnet

ip_space_id.description: The IP Block that is automatically created for this Shared Subnet

vlan_id.description: The VLAN ID if type is VLAN

region_id.description: The Region that this Storage Class belongs to

storage_capacity_mib.description: The total storage capacity of the Storage Class in mebibytes

storage_consumed_mib.description: For tenants, this represents the total storage given to all namespaces consuming from this Storage Class in mebibytes. For providers, this represents the total storage given to tenants from this Storage Class in mebibytes.

zone_ids.description: A set with all the IDs of the zones available to the Storage Class

class_name.description: The name of the Supervisor Namespace Class

conditions.description: Detailed conditions tracking Supervisor Namespace health and lifecycle events

infra_policy_names.description: List of Non-mandatory Infra Policies to be associated with the Supervisor Namespace

project_name.description: The name of the Project the Supervisor Namespace belongs to

ready.description: Whether the Supervisor Namespace is in a ready status or not

seg_name.description: Service Engine Group associated with the Supervisor Namespace

shared_subnet_names.description: Shared subnets associated with the Supervisor Namespace

already_imported.description: Defines if the T0 is already imported of Tier-0 Gateway

has_proxy.description: A flag that shows if vCenter Server has proxy defined

is_connected.description: A flag that shows if vCenter Server is connected

is_enabled.description: Should the vCenter Server be enabled

api_version.description: The maximum supported VCFA API version

condition.description: A condition to check against the VCFA version

matches_condition.description: Whether VCFA matches the condition or not
